title: Sifu Scandal
relevance_summary: Involves a known criminal working in a DeFi project, potential insider trading and mismanagement of funds.

prevention.rule: Block any tx involving known criminals or suspicious addresses.

summary: The scandal involved a known criminal, Michael Patryn (0xSifu), working in a DeFi project. Lack of transparency and potential insider trading led to the exposure of his criminal past. A guard could have blocked transactions from known criminal addresses to prevent such risks.
